name: Meredith Kelly
subject: FW: we won't be intimidated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
This is why I work for Kirsten.
Peter, I'm bumping Kirsten's email because it sums up exactly why I'm on her team: Kirsten fights for women and she fights for what's right, always, no matter the consequences.
And she's paid the price for speaking out, with establishment donors teaming up against her and launching attacks in the press. But Kirsten never wavers. She's going to take this fight all the way to the White House, but we have to hit our $10,000 goal and show our team's not backing down. No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no individual super PAC--it has to be you, powering this community-led movement.
**[Please, give every dollar you can right now to help us hit this goal, take on establishment money and win with Kirsten.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769a3/2ae112ef/10c7fabb/357aaefe/2535636614/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NjEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2761-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Meredith Kelly
Communications Director
Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
\-------Forwarded message-------
From: Kirsten
Date: Sat, Feb 16, 2019
Subject: we won't be intimidated
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769a3/2ae112ef/10c7fabb/357aaef9/2535636614/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769a3/2ae112ef/10c7fabb/357aaef9/2535636614/VEsF/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
When I called on Al Franken to resign, I paid a price. I made a lot of establishment Democratic donors angry, and they launched attacks in the press. Everyone had the same facts--there were eight credible allegations of sexual harassment and abuse that were corroborated in real time--and I refused to remain silent.
People who are used to buying power and influence don't like to be challenged. Wealthy megadonors pulled money and tried to intimidate us into silence.
**Let me tell you this: We will never accept a system that rewards sexism and silences women. But running true to our values means showing we won 't back down.** These early moments are critical, and we need $10,000 by midnight to show the strength of our movement and take on establishment money and win.
**No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no super PAC --just us. I need you to give every dollar you can now to help us do it. Here's the link to donate right now, before midnight:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769a3/2ae112ef/10c7fabb/357aaefe/2535636614/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NjEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2761-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
If it's the right thing to do, I will do it. And advocating for women is the right thing to do.
Thank you,
Kirsten
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Give $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2761-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Last month, we announced that we are getting back in the race to oust Rep. Michael McCaul. McCaul. It helps us plan for the future and will allow us to make big strides early in the campaign. Last year showed that we have what it takes to win this race and I am ready to show McCaul the door.

**[Help me give McCaul the gift of an early retirement. Set up your monthly recurring donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4896846/40916667/2139882789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWMzYzk4Yy1hMzMzLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ixTgcDmOEp_ZxGiIlHRy_LfKUt4URDsZB2SNz6EGWI=&refcode=021819&recurring=1&emci=e4c3c98c-a333-e911-b8b3-281878391efb&emdi=e5c3c98c-a333-e911-b8b3-281878391efb&ceid=6233172)** In solidarity,

name: Jason Yates
subject: Remembering Our Roots
body:
| | Peter, Today, provides America more than just a three-day weekend, shopping sales or extra time with friends and family - it’s a time to celebrate our nation’s leaders. However, considering recent abortion reports swarming the news and policy talks at an all-time high, I wanted to take this Presidents’ Day to bring us back to the heart of our nation’s foundation and our obligation as Christian citizens. George Washington pioneered the way for the presidency in the United States. Instead of kings who rule for entire lifetimes, he envisioned an America where the people would rule. No one person would hold the power of our nation, instead Americans would remain in control. And this power would be kept in check not only with a balanced system of government, but also by a moral compass. Our Founding Fathers all possessed a reverence for God and His word, and as a result, they formed a unique system entrusted into the hands of the American people. In the year 1789, Washington, in his very first inaugural address, stated, “the propitious smiles of Heaven can never be expected on a nation that disregards the eternal rules of order and right, which Heaven itself has ordained.” Washington’s words warn us never to depart from the road of biblical principles. During this Presidents’ Day, I pray that you find an extra moment of rest, but also find time to reflect on what it looks like to influence this nation with biblical principles just as our leaders have done. There are three simple, yet profound reasons as Christians we are called to bring our faith into the government realm. I encourage you to take a few minutes today to [read My Faith Votes full article on _why_ we should be engaged in the civic responsibility](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ifhmqEaha_6vJsW6Cjs_heaOpGpKozXcW3kW9gXStV0Oy_kVK-Rc2YqOBUcqRnNo6oTBskY5b3DEpC_-ZMI_tEc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190218com01&n=1). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ifhmqEaha_6vJsW6Cjs_heaOpGpKozXcW3kW9gXStV0Oy_kVK-Rc2YqOBUcqRnNo6oTBskY5b3DEpC_-ZMI_tEc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190218com01&n=2) Remember what it truly means to be a part of this one nation, under God. Happy Presidents’ Day! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO

clean_body: | | Peter, Today, provides America more than just a three-day weekend, shopping sales or extra time with friends and family - it’s a time to celebrate our nation’s leaders. However, considering recent abortion reports swarming the news and policy talks at an all-time high, I wanted to take this Presidents’ Day to bring us back to the heart of our nation’s foundation and our obligation as Christian citizens. George Washington pioneered the way for the presidency in the United States. Instead of kings who rule for entire lifetimes, he envisioned an America where the people would rule. No one person would hold the power of our nation, instead Americans would remain in control. And this power would be kept in check not only with a balanced system of government, but also by a moral compass. Our Founding Fathers all possessed a reverence for God and His word, and as a result, they formed a unique system entrusted into the hands of the American people. In the year 1789, Washington, in his very first inaugural address, stated, “the propitious smiles of Heaven can never be expected on a nation that disregards the eternal rules of order and right, which Heaven itself has ordained.” Washington’s words warn us never to depart from the road of biblical principles. During this Presidents’ Day, I pray that you find an extra moment of rest, but also find time to reflect on what it looks like to influence this nation with biblical principles just as our leaders have done. There are three simple, yet profound reasons as Christians we are called to bring our faith into the government realm. I encourage you to take a few minutes today to . Remember what it truly means to be a part of this one nation, under God. Happy Presidents’ Day! United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
